stem:
The table shows the number of graduates from the classes of 2014 through 2020 at a certain high school who enrolled in college within 24 months of graduation.

Class yearEnrolled
201492
2015110
201688
2017105
201897
201983
2020101

Of the following, which class had the fewest graduates who enrolled in college within 24 months of graduation?
rationale:
Choice D is correct. The smallest value among the choices is 83, corresponding to the class of 2019.

Choices A, B, and C give 92, 110, and 105 respectively, all larger than 83.
